Template for pull request submissions, including guidelines for issue linking and contribution steps.

# Purpose
The content provides guidelines for creating a pull request (PR) in a software project. It instructs contributors to first open a ticket describing the issue or feature that the PR will address, except for minor documentation or non-code changes. Contributors must replace the comment with a detailed description of the change and explain how it resolves the linked ticket. The content also advises linking to relevant issues or previous PRs, using the keyword `fixes` to automatically close an issue. Additionally, it emphasizes the importance of completing steps in `CONTRIBUTING.rst`, such as adding tests to demonstrate correct behavior, updating documentation, summarizing changes in `CHANGES.rst`, and including `.. versionchanged::` entries in relevant code documentation.
